## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? One or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Spec clarification (non-normative)
- [ ] Spec change (normative — requires issue discussion first)
- [ ] Reference implementation change (`acp/`)
- [ ] SDK change (`sdk/`)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Example / integration

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] For normative spec changes: a tracking issue was opened first
- [ ] Tests pass (`pytest`)
- [ ] If changing the JSON Schema: examples in `spec/examples/` are updated
- [ ] If changing the spec: `spec/CONFORMANCE.md` is updated if required
